name: Destiny HERO - Drawhand
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ－ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>デステニーヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ドローガイ
desc: If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "HERO" monster: You can make each player draw 1 card. During the next Standby Phase after this card was sent to the GY: You can Special Summon this card from your GY, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Destiny HERO - Drawhand" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "HERO" monster: You can make each player draw 1 card. During the next Standby Phase after this card was sent to the GY: You can Special Summon this card from your GY, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Destiny HERO - Drawhand" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "HERO" monster: You can make each player draw 1 card. During the next Standby Phase after this card was sent to the GY: You can Special Summon this card from your GY, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Destiny HERO - Drawhand" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
